title: Polyco 326 Optima Chemical Resistant Flock Lined Gloves, Single Pair, Size 9/Large, Green
features: Perfect for use in cleaning and janitorial applications.
Durable construction offers great strength but also maintaining a good level of dexterity.
Textured palm and fingers ensure a good level of grip when in use, even in wet conditions.
Soft cotton flock lining provides maximum user comfort whilst absorbing perspiration.
Tested and chemical resistant to EN374-2 and EN374-3.
description: Durable natural rubber chemical resistant gloves, perfect for use in cleaning and janitorial applications. Medium weight construction offers great strength but also maintaining a good level of dexterity. Textured palm and fingers ensure a good level of grip when in use, even in wet conditions. A soft cotton flock lining provides maximum user comfort whilst absorbing perspiration, keeping the hands cooling for longer periods of use. Fully comply with EN388 (1020) and EN420. Tested and chemical resistant to EN374-2 and EN374-3. Measure 30cm long and 0.52mm thickness at the palm.
